Batch index=0 size=15
CreateDocument key=1 doctype="html"
CreateElement key=2 name=html attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=1 child=2
CreateElement key=3 name=head attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=2 child=3
CreateElement key=4 name=body attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=2 child=4
CreateElement key=5 name=a attrs=[class="one"]
AppendChild parent=4 child=5
CreateText key=6 text="one"
AppendChild parent=5 child=6
CreateComment key=7 text="gap"
AppendChild parent=5 child=7
CreateElement key=8 name=a attrs=[class="two"]
AppendChild parent=4 child=8
Batch index=1 size=2
CreateText key=9 text="two"
AppendChild parent=8 child=9
